metadata_mapping.scene_title: <title> (strip trailing ' - GayHardFuck.com') or og:title meta tag
metadata_mapping.date: relative date string near duration/views block (e.g. '3 years ago') — requires conversion to approximate ISO date
metadata_mapping.description: og:description meta tag or inline paragraph near video player
metadata_mapping.performers: links to /models/ slugs on scene page (if present)
metadata_mapping.tags: links to /tags/ slugs on scene page
metadata_mapping.studio: GayHardFuck (constant — tube aggregator, no per-scene studio field)

date: Look for text matching 'X years ago', 'X months ago', 'X weeks ago', 'X days ago' in the page body near the player
Convert relative date to approximate ISO 8601 using dateutil.relativedelta or manual arithmetic from scrape time
description: paragraph following video player if OG tag absent
performers: a[href*='/models/'] — collect href slugs and display text from scene page
Note: /models/ index appears empty; performer links may be sparse or absent on many scenes
tags: a[href*='/tags/'] — collect tag label text from scene page

search_strategy.notes: Returns two sections: (1) suggested tag links and (2) video result cards. Parse video cards for title and URL. Each card links to /videos/{id}/{slug}/.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: Use scene title or filename fragment as search query. Take the top video card result if title similarity is high enough (fuzzy match recommended).

performer_page_fields.note: performerByURL is NOT supported — the /models/ index is empty and performer profile pages do not exist on this site as of May 2026.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare or captcha detected as of May 2026
Add short delay between requests if scraping multiple pages
Site may redirect http:// to https://www. — always use https://www.gayhardfuck.com/
known_limitations: Date is relative, not absolute — approximate ISO conversion required
No performer scraping — /models/ index is empty, performer pages not available
No per-scene studio field — site is a tube aggregator; hardcode constant
No structured JSON-LD or API detected
Tags may be sparse or absent on some scene pages
Search result quality depends on title match — may return false positives for fragment matching
